calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Golden Papaya Living Trust, Erika Gemzer And Jay Parekh Trustees Of The Golden Papaya Living Trust?S Responses To Special Interrogatories (Set One) And Request For Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of $1,000.00
Off Calendar Dec-15-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (by Zoom):
Spencer Sallander, Esq. Miya Deng, Esq. 213-542-8000 Haight Brown & Bonesteel for Defendant.
No other Appearance.

Parties state appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice of contest the TR was received.

ARGUED. The Court states the specifics of the TR. Mr. Sallander presents arguments. Ms Deng states wrong declaration was submitted. Counsel apologizes for inaccuracies submitted to the court. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

3 - Defendant Velox Construction, Inc.'s unopposed Motion to Compel Plaintiffs Golden Papaya Living Trust, Erika Gemzer And Jay Parekh Trustees Of The Golden Papaya Living Trust's Responses to Special Interrogatories, Set One and Request for Sanctions is DENIED.

(see word minutes for full details)

Three orders are signed after the hearing.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Notice Of Motion And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Golden Papaya Living Trust, Erika Gemzer And Jay Parekh Trustees Of The Golden Papaya Living Trusts Responses To Request For Production (Set One) And Request For Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of $1,000.00

MINI MINUTES:

ARGUED. The Court states the specifics of the TR. Mr. Sallander presents arguments. Ms Deng states wrong declaration was submitted. Counsel apologizes for inaccuracies submitted to the court. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

2 - Defendant Velox Construction, Inc.'s unopposed Motion to Compel Plaintiffs Golden Papaya Living Trust, Erika Gemzer And Jay Parekh Trustees Of The Golden Papaya Living Trust's Responses to Request for Production of Documents, Set One and Request for Sanctions is DENIED.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Notice Of Motion And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Golden Papaya Living Trust, Erika Gemzer And Jay Parekh Trustees Of The Golden Papaya Living Trust?S Responses To Form Interrogatories (Set One) And Request For Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of $1,000.00

MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (by Zoom):
Spencer Sallander, Esq. Miya Deng, Esq. 213-542-8000 Haight Brown & Bonesteel for Defendant.
No other Appearance.

Parties state appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice of contest the TR was received.

ARGUED. The Court states the specifics of the TR. Mr. Sallander presents arguments. Ms Deng states wrong declaration was submitted. Counsel apologizes for inaccuracies submitted to the court. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

1 - Defendant Velox Construction, Inc.'s unopposed Motion to Compel Plaintiffs Golden Papaya Living Trust, Erika Gemzer And Jay Parekh Trustees Of The Golden Papaya Living Trust's Responses to Form Interrogatories, Set One and Request for Sanctions is DENIED.

Three orders are signed after the hearing.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
